name: Mrs. f Double-Rich Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and cocoa powder; mix well with a wire whisk. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, blend the sugars with an electric mixer on medium speed until combined.
4. Add butter and beat to form a grainy paste. Scrape sides of the bowl.
5. Add eggs and vanilla extract; beat on medium speed until light and fluffy.
6. Gradually add the flour mixture to the sugar mixture, alternating with chocolate chips, mixing at low speed until just combined.
7. Do not overmix.
8. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets, 1 1/2 inches apart.
9. Bake for 21-23 minutes. Immediately transfer cookies to a cooling rack.
